parameters-en.OD Gain: Controls the amount of overdrive applied to the signal.
parameters-en.OD Tone: Controls the overall tonal balance of the overdrive.
parameters-en.OD Level: Controls the level of the overdrive output.
parameters-en.Low Boost: Turns a low boost for the overdrive on and off.
parameters-en.Fuzz: Turns the fuzz portion of the circuit on and off.
parameters-en.Fuzz Oct: When on, changes the fuzz into an octave up fuzz.
parameters-en.Fuzz Gain: Controls the amount of fuzz applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Fuzz Tone: Controls the tone of the fuzz from cutting the treble (at 0.0) to flat (5.0) to treble boost (10.0).
parameters-en.Fuzz Level: Controls the level of the fuzz output.
